title: gallitrichum clandestinum
intro: Gallitrichum clandestinum, also known as Gallt, is a type of lichenized fungus, specifically a species of fungus that grows in symbiotic association with a green alga. The medicinal properties of Gallitrichum clandestinum include its ability to stimulate the immune system and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties. Gallitrichum clandestinum can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used topically to treat skin issues and promote wound healing.
